_metadata.description: Character appearance seed data for G.I. Joe: Sigma 6 (2005-2007) — anime-proportioned animated series and toy-only releases

data.name: Duke (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned figure in green and black Sigma suit with exaggerated muscular build. Short blond hair with headset communicator. Equipped with high-tech pulse rifles and jetpack. Multiple mission-specific Sigma suit variants

data.name: Snake Eyes (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned ninja in sleek black Sigma suit with oversized visor and exaggerated athletic build. Dual katanas and high-tech ninja gadgets. Accompanied by cyber-enhanced wolf Timber. Silent warrior with dramatic action poses

data.name: Heavy Duty (Sigma 6)
data.description: Massive anime-proportioned African American soldier in dark green and gray Sigma suit. Hugely exaggerated muscular build even by anime standards. Carries oversized gatling gun and heavy ordnance. Shaved head with goatee

data.name: Scarlett (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned woman in red and gray Sigma suit with long red hair in ponytail. Athletic build with large expressive eyes. Armed with high-tech crossbow and energy weapons. Counter-intelligence specialist and helicopter pilot

data.name: Spirit Iron-Knife (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned Native American tracker in brown and tan Sigma suit with feather accessories. Long black hair with headband. Carries traditional tomahawk enhanced with Sigma technology. Spiritual and grounded demeanor

data.name: Tunnel Rat (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned Asian American infiltration specialist in olive and black Sigma suit. Wiry build with spiky dark hair and goggles. Explosives expert carrying demo charges and compact weaponry. Wisecracking team member

data.name: Kamakura (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned young ninja in green and black Sigma suit. Snake Eyes' apprentice with lighter build and youthful features. Armed with katana and shuriken. Multiple mission variants including Airglide Ninja with wing suit

data.name: Long Range (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned sniper specialist in tan and green Sigma suit with oversized high-tech sniper rifle. Lean build with tactical visor and camouflage elements. Calm and precise demeanor

data.name: Hi-Tech (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned tech specialist in blue and gray Sigma suit with multiple holographic displays and gadgets. Slender build with glasses and headset. Team's technology expert who operates Sigma 6 base systems. Accompanied by AI robot dog H.O.U.N.D.

data.name: H.O.U.N.D. (Sigma 6)
data.description: Compact robotic dog companion with sleek metallic blue and silver body. Anime-style mechanical design with expressive optical sensors. Hi-Tech's AI partner capable of independent combat operations and reconnaissance

data.name: Lt. Stone (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned military officer in dark blue and black Sigma suit. Broad-shouldered build with short dark hair and strong jawline. Joins the team in Season 2 commanding the Sea Titan base and Dragonhawk helicopter

data.name: Firefly (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned soldier in gray and orange Sigma suit who betrays the team. Athletic build with brown hair. Initially a trusted Joe team member before his treacherous turn in the Season 2 episode Revelations. Different characterization from ARAH Firefly

data.name: Jinx (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned female ninja in red and black outfit with long dark hair. Snake Eyes' apprentice with agile, acrobatic build. Reserve Sigma 6 member armed with dual sai and throwing stars. Large expressive eyes in anime style

data.name: Shipwreck (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned sailor in navy blue and white Sigma suit with sailor cap. Stocky muscular build with dark beard. Naval specialist equipped with aquatic Sigma tech and harpoon weapons

data.name: Cobra Commander (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned villain in dark blue and silver armor with iconic chrome battle helmet. More menacing and competent portrayal than ARAH cartoon. Tall imposing build with dramatic cape. Commands Cobra forces with ruthless efficiency

data.name: Storm Shadow (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned ninja in white and red outfit with flowing white hair. Lean muscular build with dramatic martial arts poses. Cobra's top ninja warrior and Snake Eyes' eternal rival. Multiple variants including Razor Ninja and Samurai armor

data.name: Destro (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned arms dealer in dark red and black outfit with oversized chrome metal battle mask. Heavily muscular build with high-tech weaponry integrated into Cobra armor. Supplies Cobra with advanced weapons technology

data.name: Baroness (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned woman in black and purple bodysuit with signature glasses and long dark hair. Slim athletic build with large anime-style eyes. Cobra operative specializing in hologram projection technology. Scarlett's rival. Animated series only, no toy produced

data.name: Zartan (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned master of disguise in brown and green outfit with hooded cloak. Medium athletic build with face-changing holographic abilities. Leader of the Dreadnoks with cunning, unpredictable demeanor

data.name: Overkill (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned cyborg scientist in purple and silver mechanical suit. Initially human Cobra scientist, gains cybernetic body in Season 2. Creator of B.A.T. units and the massive Overlord Vector weapon. Maniacal and obsessive personality

data.name: Overlord Vector (Sigma 6)
data.description: Massive biomechanical snake-torso B.A.T. weapon with anime-style exaggerated proportions. Purple and silver mechanical body with organic snake elements. Created by Overkill as Cobra's ultimate weapon. Towering over other characters

data.name: Ninja B.A.T. (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned ninja android in black and red armor with glowing red optics. Sleek mechanical build designed for stealth combat. Mass-produced Cobra battle android with ninja combat programming

data.name: Sky B.A.T. (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned flying android in blue and silver armor with large wing units and jet thrusters. Streamlined mechanical build optimized for aerial combat. Mass-produced Cobra airborne battle android

data.name: Cobra Red Ninja (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned ninja trooper in all-red outfit with face mask and glowing eyes. Generic Cobra ninja soldier with lean athletic build. Armed with katana and throwing weapons. Appears in groups as elite Cobra foot soldiers

data.name: Buzzer (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned Dreadnok biker with wild blond hair and punk aesthetic. Stocky muscular build with chainsaw weapon and leather vest over bare chest. Crude and aggressive personality. Animated series only

data.name: Torch (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned Dreadnok biker with red mohawk and punk attire. Large muscular build wielding oversized flamethrower weapon. Destructive and dim-witted personality. Animated series only

data.name: Machete (Sigma 6)
data.description: Anime-proportioned Dreadnok exclusive to the Sigma 6 series. Dark-skinned muscular build with military-style clothing and dual machete weapons. Original character not based on any ARAH Dreadnok

data.name: Scott Abernathy (Sigma 6)
data.description: Young boy with anime-style large eyes and messy brown hair. General Hawk's son and gadgeteer genius from Hackfield Science Academy. Civilian clothes with tech gadgets. Creator of robot companion Spud. Original Sigma 6 character

data.name: Spud (Sigma 6)
data.description: Small round robot dog with anime-style expressive eyes and stubby mechanical legs. Created by Scott Abernathy. Gray and white metallic body that can adapt and reconfigure for combat situations. Loyal and playful demeanor

data.name: Flint (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch warrant officer figure in olive and tan Sigma suit. Exaggerated muscular build with signature black beret. Armed with oversized shotgun and combat gear. Toy-only release with no animated series appearance

data.name: Gung Ho (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch Marine figure in blue and gray Sigma suit. Massively exaggerated muscular build with tattooed arms. Armed with oversized machine gun and combat knife. Toy-only release

data.name: Grand Slam (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch laser artillery specialist in silver and red Sigma suit. Muscular build with tactical helmet and visor. Armed with oversized laser cannon and targeting equipment. Toy-only release

data.name: Wet-Suit (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch Navy SEAL figure in blue and black aquatic Sigma suit with diving gear. Athletic build with flippers and underwater breathing apparatus. Armed with harpoon gun and diving knife. Toy-only release

data.name: Lockdown (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch figure in dark gray and black Sigma suit with tactical vest and heavy armor plating. Stocky muscular build. Armed with oversized riot shield and stun weapons. Toy-only release

data.name: Backblast (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch anti-aircraft specialist in olive and brown Sigma suit. Muscular build carrying oversized missile launcher on shoulder. Tactical helmet with targeting display. Toy-only release

data.name: Barrel Roll (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch pilot figure in blue and white flight Sigma suit with aviator helmet. Athletic build with flight harness and parachute pack. Armed with dual pistols. Toy-only release

data.name: Deep Six (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch deep sea specialist in orange and black diving Sigma suit with bulky pressure suit and helmet. Heavy build with oversized diving equipment and underwater tools. Toy-only release

data.name: Recondo (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch jungle trooper in green and brown camouflage Sigma suit with bush hat. Muscular build with machete, compass, and survival gear. Armed with oversized assault rifle. Toy-only release

data.name: Leatherneck (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch Marine figure in dark green and tan Sigma suit with combat helmet. Heavily muscular build with Marine Corps insignia. Armed with oversized assault rifle and bayonet. Toy-only release

data.name: Lt. Torpedo (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch Navy SEAL officer in dark blue aquatic Sigma suit. Lean athletic build with tactical diving gear and rebreather. Armed with speargun and underwater demolition charges. Toy-only release

data.name: Shockwave (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch SWAT specialist in dark blue and gray tactical Sigma suit with heavy body armor. Muscular build with ballistic shield and breaching equipment. Armed with oversized submachine gun. Toy-only release

data.name: Sgt. Boulder (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch mountain scout in gray and white alpine Sigma suit with climbing harness. Stocky muscular build with ice axe and grappling gear. Armed with oversized mountain rifle. Toy-only release

data.name: Desert Wolf (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch desert ranger in tan and khaki Sigma suit with head wrap and sand goggles. Athletic build with desert survival gear. Armed with oversized sniper rifle and combat knife. Toy-only release

data.name: Inferno (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch figure in red and black Sigma suit with flame-resistant armor plating. Muscular build equipped with fire-suppression gear and incendiary weapons. Toy-only release

data.name: Short Fuse (Sigma 6 Toy)
data.description: Anime-proportioned 8-inch figure in olive and yellow Sigma suit with mortar equipment. Muscular build carrying oversized mortar launcher and ammunition. Tactical helmet with blast visor. Toy-only release
